testcase.name: Booking API - Create Booking › should create a new booking successfully
Booking API - Create Booking--then delete booking › should create a new booking --> delete th same booking successfully
Booking API - Get All Booking IDs › should retrieve all booking IDs successfully
Booking API - Get All Booking IDs › should get booking details by booking id
Booking API - Create Booking-->Update same boking › should create a new booking then update same booking successfully
Booking API - Create Booking-->Update same boking › should update a booking with PATCH Endpoint
